_comment_demo: Primary demo/playable map for MVP. If template_level_path is set (e.g. project-owned Empty Open World at /Game/HomeWorld/Maps/Templates/EmptyOpenWorld), ensure_demo_map creates DemoMap from it when missing; else create once: File -> New Level -> Empty Open World -> Save As.
_comment_template: Optional. Set to a level asset path to create DemoMap from template when missing (e.g. save Empty Open World once as /Game/HomeWorld/Maps/Templates/EmptyOpenWorld). Leave null to log manual steps.
_comment_volume: PCG volume center and half-extents in cm. Set use_landscape_bounds false and volume_center_* / volume_extent_* to match your landscape; see docs/PCG_QUICK_SETUP.md.
_comment_exclusion_zones: Compound bounds (center + half-extents in cm). Trees will not spawn inside these zones. First zone center is used as homestead spawn (PlayerStart) when setup_level.py runs on DemoMap (MVP tutorial List 2).
_comment_resource_nodes: Day 7: positions in cm for place_resource_nodes.py. Spawns BP_HarvestableTree at each. Optional biome (Desert, Forest, Marsh, Canyon) selects node types from resource_nodes_per_biome.json. resource_node_ore_positions: BP_HarvestableOre (MVP List 6 ore). resource_node_flower_positions: BP_HarvestableFlower (MVP List 6 flowers).
_comment_mass_spawner: T4 / Day 11: place_mass_spawner_demomap.py uses these for Mass Spawner placement and count.
_comment_bed: List 56: place_bed.py places one BP_Bed at this position (cm). Near homestead spawn; run with DemoMap open.
_comment_breakfast: List 57: place_meal_triggers.py places BP_MealTrigger_Breakfast at this position (cm). Interact (E) or overlap triggers breakfast.
_comment_lunch: List 57 T3: place_meal_triggers.py places BP_MealTrigger_Lunch at this position (cm). Interact (E) or overlap triggers lunch.
_comment_dinner: List 57 T4: place_meal_triggers.py places BP_MealTrigger_Dinner at this position (cm). Interact (E) or overlap triggers dinner.
_comment_partner: List 58 T4: place_partner.py places one partner placeholder (tag Partner) at this position (cm). Interact (E) completes one love task.
_comment_child: List 59 T4: place_child.py places one child placeholder (tag Child) at this position (cm). Interact (E) completes one game with child.
_comment_build_order_wall: List 60: place_build_order_wall.py places one BP_BuildOrder_Wall (incomplete) at this position (cm). Run with DemoMap open; family agents (place_mass_spawner_demomap.py) can target it when BUILD branch is set up.
_comment_defend_gather: List 62 T1/T3: place_defend_gather_positions.py places one DefendPosition- and one GatherPosition-tagged actor at these positions (cm). Family (Family tag) teleport to Defend at night, return to Gather at dawn. Run with DemoMap open.
